questions.question: Explain the role of the reparameterization trick in VAEs.
keyPoints: Allows sampling from latent space while maintaining differentiability

questions.question: Compare and contrast GANs and Diffusion Models in terms of training stability and sample quality.
keyPoints: GANs: Adversarial training leads to instability but high-quality samples
Diffusion: Stable training through progressive denoising
Mode coverage vs computational complexity tradeoffs
